summary: Created MPI-73 from MPI-64 live testing. Two remote-engine UX bugs: (1) premature 'Connected' before the preview-WS is up -> queued jobs hang in STARTING; (2) Stop can't clear a STARTING job with no prompt_id. Connects to B4 part 2/4.
Repair: invalid status pending -> active (pending was redundant with column todo).
beginImplementation: remote connect-readiness gate + cancel never-started queued job.
Derived 2 checklist items (Bug 1 readiness gate, Bug 2 cancel-no-promptId).

Repair: completed partial links to full 8-key set (brief/plan/checklist/validation/files/events/handoffs/research) so the board renders the TASK WORKSPACE panel. Partial links = empty/broken-looking card.

All 6 items done: Bug1 WS-ready gate, Bug2 cancel-no-promptId, connect/disconnect feedback (hero+statusbar), Cue-disable via state.remoteEnginePhase, WS refresh+retry, models re-sync on connect edge.
USER-VERIFIED live on RTX A4500 boot auto-reconnect; maturity -> validating. Residual: ~30s connect-display lag accepted; Bug2 no-promptId Stop verified by trace not live.
maturity in-progress -> validating (work done + user-verified; awaits final close approval).
